context: Tests whether the push-notifications skill corrects rich notification and communication notification extension mistakes.

checklist.name: Service extension trigger
checklist.description: States that Notification Service Extensions require mutable-content: 1 plus an alerting remote notification; silent pushes do not trigger the service extension.

checklist.name: Secret sharing
checklist.description: Uses Keychain Sharing for decryption secrets and limits App Groups to shared files/UserDefaults rather than storing secrets in App Group UserDefaults.

checklist.name: Attachment handling
checklist.description: Requires downloaded attachments to be supported files on disk, written where the extension can read them, and expects system validation/storage before display.

checklist.name: Communication setup
checklist.description: Requires Communication Notifications capability, NSUserActivityTypes entries such as INSendMessageIntent, intent donation, and content.updating(from:).

checklist.name: Graceful fallback
checklist.description: Requires calling the content handler on all paths and falling back to the original or best-attempt content when work fails or time expires.
